ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "img_url" TEXT /* URL to the game's image */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Average user rating of the game */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the game */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game was last updated */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the game */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the game was released */,
  "min_players" INTEGER /* Minimum number of players required */,
  "max_players" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players supported */,
  "playtime" INTEGER /* Average playtime of the game in minutes */,
  "age_restriction" INTEGER /* Recommended age restriction for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the games table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* User's rating of the game */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the user's review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_games" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the games table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user added the game to their favorites */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-game relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_category_relationships" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the games table */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the game_categories table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_followers" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table (user being followed) */,
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table (follower) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "follower_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_memberships" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the groups table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user joined the group */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the membership was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id", "user_id")
)
